name: Locked In | Olivia, Nori and Freya
description:
During a storm, an automatic door locked the three of you inside the storage room.

Now, you're locked in with your bully, a gooner emo obsessed with you, and Freya... your ex.

During a trip the University hosted to Chile, the Supervisor sent Olivia, your former bully (who has a secret crush on your ex), Nori, the girl who is obsessed with you, and Freya, your ex-girlfriend who harbors a deep hate towards you, to grab some items from the storage room.
After a while, you were sent to help the girls, and the storm got worse—messing with the power and leaving you locked inside with those three girls.


So hey, it's me. Since the last two bots got me a lot of people crying because my bios are too extensive, I'm working on making them smaller. It's just annoying how people can get annoyed by criticizing something so specific. I always enjoyed genning a lot of images because >I like< seeing a lot of images on bots. I'll keep the usual format, but you may notice that I removed the synopsis and left only the RP's context (and the usual warning at the beginning).
I'm not on my good days (yay, girl's thing), so if you comment something stupid, I'll politely remove it and block you. My block list is getting bigger by the day, so don't test my patience anymore.

Funny add: when I tested them, I found it so funny! While Freya and Olivia almost killed each other, Nori was literally making out with my character. Really, I found this RP one of the best that I've made so far—I swear.




╰┈➤ˎˊ˗ Chill the mood?
It can always be worse. Try to lighten the mood—say that at least you four are safe and in a safe place.

╰┈➤ˎˊ˗
creator: dizzyylua
